user_task_description: This workbook contains an inaccurate ops-summary note that should be corrected and visually supported with evidence.

atomic_scope: Only the targeted note rewrite in `Ops Summary!B8` and the supporting-row highlight on `Monthly Data` are explicitly requested.
expected_output_type: A revised .xlsx workbook with an accurate executive-safe note and highlighted supporting rows.
